item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Family Caregiver Tax Credit
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Family Caregiver Tax Credit

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal Family Caregiver Tax Credit in the 119th Congress addressing the $11T unpaid-care-work documented economic gap.

What does it actually do?

  • Refundable tax credit for unpaid family caregivers
  • Income-tier based amount (typically $5K maximum)
  • Eligible-recipient definition (spouse / parent / child / Trust Graph node)
  • Coordination with FMLA and Pregnant Workers Fairness Act

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Direct composing with #5 The Family Table ($11T unpaid-care-work canonical adversary). Federal recognition of caregiving work composes with cooperative-class care infrastructure.
